name: Agentic Commerce Blueprint
description: Dockerized NVIDIA agentic commerce stack with storefront, merchant APIs, agents, Milvus, MinIO and Phoenix.

minimum.notes: API mode can use NVIDIA hosted endpoints; local NIM mode needs NVIDIA GPU.

requiredTools.label: Git
requiredTools.installHint: Windows: winget install Git.Git. Linux: install git from your package manager.

requiredTools.label: Docker
requiredTools.installHint: Install Docker Desktop on Windows/macOS or Docker Engine on Linux.

requiredTools.label: Docker Compose v2
requiredTools.installHint: Install Docker Compose v2 plugin or Docker Desktop.

requiredTools.label: Docker daemon
requiredTools.installHint: Start Docker Desktop and wait until the Linux engine is running.

runtimeModes.label: NVIDIA API mode
runtimeModes.description: Uses NVIDIA hosted NIM-compatible endpoints. No local GPU is required, but NVIDIA_API_KEY is required.

runtimeModes.label: Local NIM mode
runtimeModes.description: Starts local NIM LLM and embedding containers. Requires NVIDIA GPU, NVIDIA runtime and model access.

setupNotes: Install clones the source into deploy/agentic-commerce-blueprint.
Default Hub run path uses Docker Compose and fixed gateway port 8088.
Source repo supports Git Bash/Linux shell through runall.sh; Hub wrapper supports Windows PowerShell and Linux.
